scripts.seed:resources:ohio: python3 scripts/build-ohio-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/ohio-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/ohio-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Ohio RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d2000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-ohio-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/ohio-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:indiana: python3 scripts/build-indiana-resources.py && python3 scripts/enrich-resources.py data/indiana-resources.csv --write-json data/enrichments/indiana-enriched.json && RESOURCES_DEFAULT_STATE=Indiana RESOURCES_UUID_PREFIX=d3000001 RESOURCES_SEED_OUTPUT=supabase/seed-indiana-resources.sql RESOURCES_INCLUDE_CATEGORIES=false npx tsx scripts/generate-resources-seed.ts data/indiana-resources.csv
scripts.seed:resources:all: npm run seed:resources && npm run seed:resources:ohio && npm run seed:resources:indiana
scripts.tag:intake: npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/resources.csv && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/ohio-resources.csv
scripts.tag:intake:dry: npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/resources.csv --dry-run && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/ohio-resources.csv --dry-run
scripts.tag:intake:llm: npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/resources.csv --llm --write-json data/enrichments/intake-signals-ky-llm.json && npx tsx scripts/tag-intake-signals.ts data/ohio-resources.csv --llm --write-json data/enrichments/intake-signals-ohio-llm.json
